title: sauropus ochrophyllus
intro: Sauropus ochrophyllus, commonly known as the 'Tahina' or 'Saraca', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Sauropus ochrophyllus include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory and digestive issues, and provide relief from joint pain and swelling. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
